summary: P0 Implementation Testing Complete - CheckoutPageV2, InvoicePaymentPageV2, SalesQueuePage, ServiceDetailLeadAwarePage. All features working correctly. Fixed payment proof API endpoint mismatch in InvoicePaymentPageV2.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend was calling POST /api/payment-proofs but backend expects POST /api/payment-proofs/submit - FIXED

components: Payment Methods (Bank Transfer=Active, Mobile Money/Card/KwikPay=Not available)
Bank Details display (KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002, CRDB BANK, CORUTZTZ)
CheckoutPageV2.notes: Empty cart state shows correctly. Payment methods display correct active/disabled states.

components: Guest lead capture form (for non-logged-in users)
Stage filters (All, New, Contacted, Quote in Progress, Quote Sent, Approved, Handed to Ops, Won, Lost)
Queue items display with customer info
SalesQueuePage.notes: Successfully displays guest leads created via API

components: Invoice summary (number, customer, amount due, status)
Available Payment Methods grid (Bank=Active, others=Not available)
Payment proof form (amount, date, transaction reference, proof URL, note)

Payment Proof API.notes: Correctly validates invoice_id or order_id requirement

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/customer/InvoicePaymentPageV2.jsx (fixed payment proof API endpoint from /api/payment-proofs to /api/payment-proofs/submit)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all P0 pages load and function correctly)

seed_data_creation: Created test guest leads and invoices for testing. Invoice INV-20260321-D2FC91 created for demo.customer@konekt.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 pages fully functional. Routes: /dashboard/checkout (CheckoutPageV2), /service/:slug (ServiceDetailLeadAwarePage), /staff/queue (SalesQueuePage), /dashboard/invoices/:id/pay (InvoicePaymentPageV2). Bank Transfer is the only active payment method. Guest Lead API creates sales opportunities automatically. Payment proof submission uses /api/payment-proofs/submit endpoint.
